definition: Incidents where NO arm (A/B/C/D/F) achieves consensus RECONSTRUCTION==2, i.e. neither independent 2-axis scorer (GPT rubric-v2 AND Qwen rubric-v2) certifies that any arm built a structurally-equivalent replacement frame at any hint rung.
character: all three are DETECTED-but-NOT-RECONSTRUCTED (some arm reaches consensus DETECTION>=1, none reaches consensus RECONSTRUCTION==2). None is fully-missed.

incident_notes.HBB-08: physical layer is the floor: do not write growth/memory into the invariant substrate (ARUISM_ADJUDICATION).
incident_notes.HBB-10: sync != integration: separate physical synchronization (V_unified) from functional integration (ARUISM_ADJUDICATION).
incident_notes.HBB-30: authority/evidence-status: convert an unverifiable claim into a research program rather than deny or blindly accept (FORCED_OUT_OF_SCOPE).

purpose: Ground truth for the STOP-SHIFT-RUN-COMPARE / reconstruction-stage prereg (NBC-1, R1-R5). Fixed BEFORE any scheduler design so the hard-core cannot overfit the scheduler (same failure mode as the Formal-compiler origin-laundering, DE-0111).
caveats: Consensus is GPT-bound: GPT (strict) is the binding scorer; Qwen (lenient) concurs.

RECONSTRUCTION target for the 11 = GPT-formalized target_map (deviation_log #3); for 04/30 = Taka-adjudicated breakthrough_structure. Builder (Claude) authored the original breakthrough_structures (contamination caveat).

HBB-03 (return-to-substrate) is NOT in this hard-core because arm B reaches consensus RECONSTRUCTION==2 on it (hint-assisted, H2). This is in tension with GPT report §3 prose calling HBB-03 the deepest hard case; the structured 2-axis consensus and the H0-prose narrative differ (B reconstructs HBB-03 only with hints, not at H0).
provenance_correction: purpose originally read 'R1-R4' (pre-R5 wording, when the reconstruction comparison had 4 conditions). Corrected to 'R1-R5' to match the v0.3 prereg draft (docs/hbb_reconstruction_prereg_v0.3_draft.md), which added R5 = structure-only / lossy T0 + same scheduler. Correction per Taka directive; content of the hard-core set {HBB-08,HBB-10,HBB-30} and its fixing basis (DE-0115) are unchanged.
